name: Wii U Dev Environment
postCreateCommand:
sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y git make curl && \
                        curl -LO https://github.com/devkitPro/pacman/releases/latest/download/devkitpro-pacman.deb && \
                        sudo dpkg -i devkitpro-pacman.deb && \
                        sudo dkp-pacman -S --noconfirm devkitPPC wut-examples
